problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
